title: Implement SMB controller
description: Create controller_smb.go with SMB-specific CreateVolume, DeleteVolume, and ExpandVolume implementations, following the pattern of controller_nfs.go/controller_iscsi.go/controller_nvmeof.go.

title: Add SMB documentation
description: Create QUICKSTART-SMB.md and update FEATURES.md, README.md, DEPLOYMENT.md with SMB protocol information, prerequisites, and configuration examples.

title: Review all E2E tests for multiprotocol SMB coverage
description: Review all E2E tests that iterate over multiple protocols (e.g., reclaim_policy_test.go, encryption tests) and ensure SMB is included in the protocol list.

title: Review full codebase for SMB protocol parity
description: Review the entire tns-csi codebase to ensure SMB support is inline with other protocols - check switch statements, protocol lists, error handling, metrics, logging, and any other places that enumerate protocols.

title: Add SMB support to the tests dashboard
description: Update the tests dashboard to display SMB test results alongside NFS, iSCSI, and NVMe-oF results.

title: Add SMB support to the kubectl plugin
description: Update the kubectl tns-csi plugin to recognize and handle SMB volumes in list, health, troubleshoot, cleanup, and other commands.

title: Implement SMB node operations
description: Create node_smb.go with stage/unstage/publish/unpublish operations using CIFS mounts, following the pattern of node_nfs.go/node_iscsi.go/node_nvmeof.go.

title: Add SMB API methods to TrueNAS client
description: Add sharing.smb.create/delete/query WebSocket API methods to pkg/tnsapi/client.go and interface.go, following the pattern of existing NFS/iSCSI/NVMe-oF methods.

title: SMB protocol support
description: Implementation of SMB protocol next to existing NFS, iSCSI and NVMe-oF.

title: Update Helm chart for SMB storage class
description: Add SMB storage class option to Helm chart values.yaml and templates, following the pattern of existing NFS/iSCSI/NVMe-oF storage classes.

title: Add SMB E2E tests
description: Create E2E test suite under tests/e2e/smb/ covering basic provisioning, expansion, snapshots, cloning, and data persistence for SMB volumes.
